elements.purpose: Smallest visual atoms — no children, no fetching, no arrangement

wrappers.purpose: Holds, groups, or spatially arranges other components

displays.purpose: Renders authored content into a specific visual format

scaffolding.purpose: One-per-page structural skeleton — heroes, portals, frame-mode

integrators.purpose: Fetches, embeds, or binds to external/third-party data

components.name: MermaidColours
components.description: Theme colour definitions for Mermaid diagrams (light/dark/CSS variable mappings).

components.description: Custom-styled API response field with configurable margin.

params.description: Primary content rendered by the component.

components.description: Accordion-style response field with collapsible detail section.

components.description: Expandable response field that reveals nested content on click.

components.description: Container for grouping multiple response fields with consistent spacing.

params.name: props
params.description: Additional props forwarded to the selected wrapper component.

components.name: ExternalContent
components.description: Fetches and renders external markdown with scrollable container and source link.

params.description: Repo name used by the component.
